message:
btree: implement balance_shallower root collapse (bd-14lx)

When balance_nonroot merges children and leaves the root with zero cells,
copy the single right-child's content into the root and free the child
page, reducing tree depth by one. This is the inverse of balance_deeper
and corresponds to SQLite's balance-shallower sub-algorithm (btree.c
~8942-8967).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
